title: RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with 10-day notices or security deposits. Funds may be used to pay a security deposit fee or to prevent eviction. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 2316 South 6th Street Suite B Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: -Rental deposit: Households who are living in a shelter, a vehicle, a tent, fleeing DV or living in a place not meant for human habitation -Rent assistance: Received a 10-day eviction notice -All services: Additional eligibility criteria may vary depending on the funding source Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm, closed all federal holidays Email (541) 882-3500 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 882-3500 Main phone Main phone (541) 882-3500 Makenzie Bispham [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or walk in to fill out a rental assistance form; may be submitted electronically or at the drop box. Contact will be made via email by a housing coordinator in the order received. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. Forms available in English and Spanish. AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES
